items.h: AEW Dynamite - 6/24/2026: 3 Things We Hated And 3 We Loved

items.h: AEW Collision (6/20) Viewership Declines, Demo Rating Increases On Cable TV
items.p: AEW Collision viewership information for June 20. Programming Insider reports that AEW Collision drew 350,000 viewers on TNT on June 20. This number is down from the 365,000 viewers the show drew...

items.h: Konosuke Takeshita Retains AEW International Title In Dynamite Main Event
items.p: Konosuke Takeshita retained the AEW International Championship in the main event of "AEW Dynamite."

items.h: Two More Women Heading To AEW TBS Title Survival Of The Fittest Match
items.p: Two more competitors for the TBS Championship Survival of the Fittest Match next week were determined on "AEW Dynamite."
